_doc: Phase-0 frozen fixture (Pass-5 fixture-is-oracle). Captured from REAL session 20260620_183729_da1192ac via estimate_messages_tokens_rough over disjoint row subsets. The message axis is EXACT real data; summary/anchor token values model a representative post-compaction summary+anchor for hermetic reconciliation. This fixture is the ORACLE: a producer mismatch is a producer bug, not a re-freeze. Re-freeze only on a deliberate LCM-behavior change, with a reason.

tool_heavy_hygiene._note: Real 748-msg session da1192ac. cleared = filter-removed (tool+system+contentless-assistant). fold = eligible minus fresh-tail-32. Post = kept + 1 summary + system anchor.

_reconciles.eligible: kept 32 + folded 300 == eligible 332; cleared 416 == pre 748 - eligible 332

zero_fold_222._note: The literal 222->222 shape: hygiene removed tool/system/contentless (cleared>0) but LCM folded nothing (folded=0, summary=0, kept==eligible). Synthetic but structurally exact; validate() must accept it.

zero_clear_allchat._note: All-chat session: hygiene filter removes nothing (cleared==0, eligible==pre), LCM folds older chat into a summary. Formatter must omit the 'Removed from live context' block.

_reconciles.freed: pre 58000 - post 12500 == 45500; cleared 0 + folded 50000 - summary 3000 - anchor 1500 == 45500
